creator: bobf@mrp3.com
text:
Recently installed 14.1-RELEASE.  The bug was observed on 12.2 and I would occasionally see it affect icecast by skipping parts of songs or leaving 'dead air' gaps in he stream.

Since upgrading to 14.1-RELEASE I am not seeing this behavior.  As such there is at least some indication that multimedia clocks are at least more consistent.

Once I have finished upgrading 2 machines I can give this a proper test.  Still nice to know that in the newer RELEASE version it may have been fixed.
